name: Dji RS 5 Gimbal Stabilizer Basic Combo
description: Get even smoother video footage, complete with a Z-axis (vertical) indicator, using the RS 5 Gimbal Stabilizer from DJI.

features.General Features: Lightweight 3.2 lb Body, 6.6 lb Payload | Z-Axis Indicator | One-Hour Full Charge with 65W PD Charger | 2nd Gen Automated Axis Locks | Separate AI Tracking and Framing Module | Separate Electronic Control Handle | OLED Touchscreen with Auto-Lock | 3rd Gen Native Vertical Shooting | Joystick or Bluetooth Mode Switching | Teflon-Coated Axes, Enhanced Balancing
